activities_projects.title: Importance of Manufacturing
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of manufacturing industries in economic development
steps: Read the section on importance of manufacturing
List five benefits of manufacturing industries
Explain how manufacturing supports agriculture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of manufacturing industries in national development
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and correct points (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Industry Classification Chart
steps: Draw a chart showing classification of industries
Include categories such as raw material, ownership and capital investment
Provide at least two examples for each category
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands different bases of industrial classification
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and accuracy of chart (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cotton Textile Industry Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Study the factors influencing the location of cotton textile industries
steps: Identify major cotton textile centres like Mumbai, Ahmedabad and Coimbatore
Mark them on an outline map of India
Write three factors responsible for their location
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct map work and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Jute Industry Location Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the regional concentration of jute industries
steps: Locate the Hugli River on the map
Research why jute mills are concentrated near this region
List products manufactured from jute
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands geographical factors influencing industry location
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Iron and Steel Industry Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study raw materials and location factors of iron and steel plants
steps: List the raw materials required for steel production
Locate Bhilai, Bokaro and Rourkela steel plants
Explain why the Chhotanagpur Plateau region is suitable for this industry
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands raw material and location factors of steel industry

activities_projects.title: Aluminium Industry Process
activities_projects.objective: Understand the process of aluminium production
steps: Draw a flowchart showing aluminium production from bauxite
Label the stages such as mining, refining and smelting
Write the uses of aluminium in daily life
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of flowchart and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Automobile Industry Growth
activities_projects.objective: Understand the development of automobile industries in India
steps: List major automobile manufacturing centres in India
Explain how liberalisation increased automobile production
Write the importance of the automobile industry for transportation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands growth factors of automobile industries

activities_projects.title: Information Technology Industry Study
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the growth of IT and electronics industries
steps: Identify major IT centres like Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Pune
Mark them on a map of India
Write two reasons for their growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands role of IT industry in modern economy

activities_projects.title: Industrial Pollution Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand types and causes of industrial pollution
steps: List the four types of industrial pollution
Explain their causes with examples
Write two impacts on environment and health

activities_projects.title: Pollution Control Strategies
activities_projects.objective: Explore methods to reduce industrial pollution
steps: List three methods to reduce water pollution from industries
List two methods to reduce air pollution
Suggest one innovative idea to make industries eco-friendly
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality and practicality of suggestions (10 marks)
